name: Emoji Coloring
author: Poki
description: Emoji Coloring is a coloring game where you can express yourself in limitless ways! The game is packed with more than 1000 coloring pages of all the emojis you know and love. There are many different categories for you to explore such as animals, emoticons, food, and others! You can pick from pre-selected colors that you can apply to their correct places, or you could let your imagination run wild and experiment with your own different color and pattern combinations. Can you bring a spark of life to all of the paintings? How do I play Emoji Coloring? Use your mouse to select different colors, then click and drag to apply them to complete the painting! Who created Emoji Coloring? Emoji Coloring is created by Illusivegames. Play their other games on Poki: Prismo Puzzles and Prismo Coloring ! How can I play Emoji Coloring for free? You can play Emoji Coloring for free on Poki. Can I play Emoji Coloring on mobile devices and desktop? Emoji Coloring can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
